description: Composition Pink kurta made of a blended fabric, has a V-neckline with a mock button closure and brown and olive green chest placket, short sleeves with brown and olive green piping on the cuffs and traditional black and gold coloured print Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Vintage weaves, classic cuts and contemporary style - all come together in this kurta from diva. Crafted from a soft blended fabric, it offers exemplary comfort all day. Pair it with patialas or churidars and embellished slippers for an ethnic look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5’9”, chest 33” and shoulders 15.5”
